overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a rural landscape at golden hour. The character travels along a dirt path past a wooden fortified hut, along a lakeside with NPCs present, and into a denser forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path approaching wooden fortified building

events.description: passing the wooden fortified hut on the right, opening up to lakeside view

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt path toward the wooden building

notable_agents.action: standing near the wooden hut entrance

entered.detail: dark wooden building with steep roof and weathered planks
worn dirt path cutting through tall grass
deciduous trees lining the left side of the path
deciduous trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running along a dirt trail toward a dark wooden fortified hut. The golden hour sun casts long shadows across the path. As the character passes the hut at 8 seconds, the view opens up to reveal a lake on the right, transitioning from the enclosed approach to an open lakeside environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lakeside path with water views

events.description: child NPC runs past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with the lake visible to the right, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: child running past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: calm water body reflecting the orange sunset light
small wooden pier extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: Running along the open lakeside trail with expansive water views to the right. At 16 seconds, a child NPC runs past from right to left. The wooden dock becomes visible in the distance across the water, while the path remains bordered by grass banks and scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional path with wooden fencing and wildflowers

events.description: path curves left, wooden fence with red flowers appears on left side

agents.ego_description: running along the curving path past wooden fences and wildflowers

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence with red flowering bushes growing alongside
stone tower visible on the horizon silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The path curves leftward, transitioning away from the lake into a more inland setting. A rustic wooden fence with vibrant red flowers lines the left side. In the distance, a fortified stone tower becomes visible against the golden sky as the character continues running forward.

events.description: entering denser forest area with thicker vegetation closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: running into the denser forest as the path narrows and becomes more enclosed

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine and deciduous trees creating a canopy
thick cluster of pine and deciduous trees creating a canopy

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path entering a densely forested area. The vegetation becomes thick on both sides, partially obscuring the sky and creating a more enclosed, shaded environment. The dirt trail continues forward into the deepening woods as the golden light filters through the tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural landscape that transforms from an open lakeside trail into a dense, shaded forest. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt path toward a dark wooden fortified hut under the long shadows of the golden hour sun. As the character passes the hut, the view opens up to an expansive lakeside environment where a child NPC runs across the path and a wooden dock appears in the distance. The scene then shifts as the trail curves away from the water, passing a rustic wooden fence adorned with red flowers and revealing a fortified stone tower against the glowing sky. Finally, the path leads into a thick forested area where the vegetation closes in on both sides, filtering the golden light through a heavy canopy of trees.
